name: Courage
description: Empowered to face fear and act; the gateway emotion.

name: Trust
description: Neutral, unattached steadiness; life is workable.

name: Acceptance
description: Forgiving, harmonious; takes ownership without blame.

name: Confidence
description: Settled certainty in your own capability.

name: Clarity
description: Reasoned, understanding; sees the system, not just the moment.

name: Warmth
description: Open-hearted goodwill toward people, including yourself.

name: Gratitude
description: Feeling as if it's already given; abundance in the body.

name: Enthusiasm
description: Lit-up eagerness; energy that pulls others along.

name: Joy
description: Serene delight arising from within, not circumstances.

name: Playfulness
description: Light grip on life; finds the game inside the task.

name: Compassion
description: Tender strength; kindness with a spine.

name: Peace
description: Deep stillness; nothing needs to be different right now.

name: Determination
description: Committed forward drive; the decision has been made.
